title: Process Injection via CreateRemoteThread
description: Detects suspicious processes commonly used as injection vehicles with command-line indicators of injection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*VirtualAllocEx*' or 'Command Line' like '*WriteProcessMemory*' or 'Command Line' like '*CreateRemoteThread*' or 'Command Line' like '*NtMapViewOfSection*')))

tests.test_name: WinPwn - Get SYSTEM shell - Bind System Shell using UsoClient DLL load technique
